string.text: Assault Territory for Dushman
Clear the area of any and all hostile threats.

%c[ui_8]Enemies have been spotted in our zone. I need you to lead the assault. Your job is to clear the area of all hostiles. Time's short - move out.\n\n%c[ui_orange][This task will fail if after taking it, the player goes to a location where this task is not available]
Excellent work. You are a fine warrior.
Find the %s Artifact for Dushman
There is a contract for %s Artifact.
There is a contract for an Artifact. Are you interested?
%c[ui_8]There is a contract for %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] Artifact. I don't care where are you going to get it but the job must be done. Are you interested?
Excellent work. Here your percentage.
Kill Loner Contract
You have been contracted to find and eliminate a target. Return for payment when the task is complete.

%c[ui_8]Our employer sent over a new list of jobs the other day, and someone's gotta deal with all this. We don't want to lose our clients' trust, right? Anyway, your task is to find and take out one guy. Doesn't matter who he is. If you're curious, I can send the details to your PDA.
It is done? Great. Here your percentage.
Kill Duty Contract
You have been contracted to find and eliminate a special target. Return for payment when the task is complete.
%c[ui_8]Another job from a big client. We need to take out one of the Duty. Same as always – find and eliminate. You taking the job?
Great. Here is your money for the work done.
Kill Freedom Contract
You have been contracted to find and eliminate a special target. Return for payment when the task is complete.
%c[ui_8]Another job. This time, it's to take out one of the Freedom. Everything needs to go smoothly, we don't want to lose our clients' trust, right? If you're interested, I can send the details.
It is done? Great. Here your percentage.
Punishment Mission
%s from killed enemy.
Kill several enemy stalkers and bring their patches as a prove.

%c[ui_8]One of our squads got hit. A few guys didn't make it. We need to send a message - show what happens to anyone who crosses us. I want you to bring a pile of %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] as proof this punishment op was a success. Are you on it?
Good job! They will think twice next time.
Wild Game Meat for Dushman
%s get it and bring it to Dushman, so the guys can eat some grilled meat.
The guys are complaining they're sick of eating dry rations. Hell, I wouldn't mind a juicy steak with blood! Don't you wanna go on a safari and bring back some fresh meat?

%c[ui_8]The guys are complaining they're sick of eating dry rations. Hell, I wouldn't mind a juicy steak with blood! Don't you wanna go on a safari and bring back some fresh meat? %c[ui_orange]%s%c[default] - that'll do just fine.
Perfect - fresh meat! Finally, something other than those stupid cans.
Find %s for Hog
%s are required by Hog to install basic equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I have a proposition for you. If you can bring me some new tools, you will receive payment. Are you up for it?

%c[ui_8]Good. I've been looking all over for a %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. It should contain some oil and tools I need to do work on firearms. I will pay you for one of these toolkits if you can bring a full set back to me.
Right, on. This is what I've been looking for, thank!
Find %s for Hog
%s are required by Hog to install advanced equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I have another proposition. The toolkit you brought me is working out good, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?
%c[ui_8]I need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. I'm not sure where you can get one of these, but if you can find one, I need it.
Everything I need is here. Thank you.
Find %s for Hog
%s are required by Hog to install expert equipment upgrades, you should bring them back to him if you find any.
I have another proposition. The toolkit you brought me is working out good, but it doesn't have everything I need. Do you think you can find me a better set?

%c[ui_8]You've helped me a lot already, but I still need an %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8]. If I have that tools, I would be able to upgrade your equipment to the highest standard. If you find it anywhere, then bring it here.
Everything I need is here. Thank you.
Find %s for Hog
Good condition %s are required by Hog
I am looking for different guns for my work. If you are interested in the job, I will give you more details. What would you say?

%c[ui_8]I am looking for guns for work. Right now, I need %c[ui_orange]%s%c[ui_8] in good shape. I will pay well. If the gun's in bad shape, use a %c[ui_orange]Gunsmith kit%c[ui_8]. And if you're a screw-up, bring it to me to fix - but it won't be free.
Perfect. Just what I needed. Here's your payment.
Take the case from the stash and bring it to Surgeon
Go to the specified location, take the case from the stash, and bring it to Surgeon.

%c[ui_8]Listen up, buddy. I'm expecting an important delivery that includes... some medical supplies. The courier, as usual, couldn't make it to us - he stashed the goods and sent the coordinates. I'll pay you if you go, grab the case, and bring it to me. But mark my words - what's inside is none of your business. You in?
Excellent, well done. Here, you've earned your share.
